tasks.title: Create weavory project directory tree
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All planned directories exist; repo boots on 'ls'.

tasks.title: Bootstrap package.json, tsconfig.json, .gitignore
tasks.acceptance_criteria: package.json has 5 scripts (dev, test, verify:gate*, collect:*, build). tsconfig has strict:true.

tasks.title: Seed /control/ files with real data
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All nine control files exist with real seeded content; no placeholder fabrication.

tasks.title: Build dashboard shell at /ops/weavory-dashboard.html
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Static HTML fetches /ops/data/*.json and /control/*.json; renders 12 sections; missing data shows 'Not collected yet'; no inline fabricated content.

tasks.title: Implement git collector (scripts/collect/git.ts)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Running the script produces /ops/data/git.json with branch, last_commit, status_counts, recent_commits[]. No fabricated entries.

tasks.title: Implement tasks collector (scripts/collect/tasks.ts)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Produces /ops/data/tasks-summary.json from control/TASKS.json counts-by-status.

tasks.title: Gate 1 verification script (scripts/verify/gate1.sh)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Script exits 0 iff: control files present, dashboard present, git.json produced, package.json scripts runnable.

tasks.title: Initialize git repo and first commit
tasks.acceptance_criteria: git init done; first commit message references W-0001..W-0007 with no bypassed hooks.

tasks.title: Implement belief schema (Phase B)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Belief type is NANDA AgentFacts superset; Zod schema validates; unit tests green.

tasks.title: Implement Ed25519 sign/verify (Phase B)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: generateKey/sign/verify round-trip; tamper detected; unit tests green.

tasks.title: Implement BLAKE3 hash-chain audit (Phase B)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Append-only log; each entry references prev hash; tamper detection unit test green.

tasks.title: MCP server wiring + five tool stubs (Phase C)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: All five tools registered with Zod schemas; MCP Inspector can list and invoke each.

tasks.title: LanceDB vector store integration (Phase C)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Beliefs embedded and persisted; top-k similarity returns expected neighbors in integration test.

tasks.title: DuckDB bi-temporal store (Phase C)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Beliefs stored with valid_from/valid_to + recorded_at; as_of query returns prior state; unit tests green.

tasks.title: OR-set CRDT + LWW default merge (Phase C)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Concurrent writes reconciled; tombstones respected; unit tests green.

tasks.title: Semantic subscribe via SSE (Phase C)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Subscribe stream emits matching beliefs via SSE; backpressure tested; integration test green.

tasks.title: Trust vector + quarantine (Phase C)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Unsigned/low-trust beliefs filtered from recall by default; quarantine set observable via runtime events.

tasks.title: Two-agent example + judge walkthrough (Phase D)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Two agents exchange a belief and both answer the scripted task correctly.

tasks.title: README + QUICKSTART (Phase D)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Judge runbook: three-line install + 60s OpenClaw walkthrough; time-to-first-belief < 90s on a clean machine.

tasks.title: Judge verification script (Phase D)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Script exercises two-agent exchange; exits 0 on success.

tasks.title: Wire dashboard to real data (Phase E)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Dashboard displays only real data from collectors; no mock entries; missing data clearly labeled.

tasks.title: Unit + integration test suite ≥90% core coverage (Phase F)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Coverage JSON shows ≥90% on src/core, src/coord, src/trust.

tasks.title: Fresh-machine CI (Phase F)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions on Ubuntu + macOS clean runners runs gate3 and gate7 scripts, green.

tasks.title: Gate 7 judge simulation (Phase F)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Stock OpenClaw-compatible agent completes scripted task using only docs/README.md.

tasks.title: RuntimeWriter atomic snapshot (Phase G.1)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Atomic tmp+rename writes; debounce ≥50ms; idempotent attach; process-exit handlers flush 'stopped' snapshot; never crashes engine on disk errors.

tasks.title: EngineState onOp hooks + MCP writer install (Phase G.1)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: onOp callback fires after every believe/recall/subscribe/attest/forget. createServer attaches writer by default; off under VITEST=true or WEAVORY_RUNTIME_WRITER=off.

tasks.title: RuntimeWriter tests + live dashboard verification (Phase G.1)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: 9 unit tests cover startup snapshot, op snapshots, atomicity, shutdown snapshot, tamper alarm, resilience, idempotent attach. Full Vitest suite 54/54 green. All Phase-1 gate scripts 1-5 still pass. Real runtime.json surfaces in dashboard panel 10 after example demos run.

tasks.title: Subscription match queue + delivery-receipt ack (Phase G.2)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Subscription accumulates matching beliefs in a queue on every believe; recall(subscription_id) drains the queue and returns delivered_count. Queue bounded; back-pressure when full.

tasks.title: Consensus merge + conflict visibility (Phase G.2)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: recall can surface conflicting live beliefs on same (subject, predicate); merge strategy pluggable (LWW default, consensus, LLM-judge opt-in).

tasks.title: LLM-judge merge opt-in via WEAVORY_LLM_JUDGE=1 (Phase G.2)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Env flag enables LLM-judge merge path; default stays deterministic (LWW + consensus).

tasks.title: commons_swarm demo + gate_commons verify (Phase G.2)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Three agents publish overlapping beliefs; subscriber drains queue deterministically; conflict surfaces when include_conflicts is true.

tasks.title: Adversarial mode flag (Phase G.3)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: EngineState.adversarialMode flag; createServer reads WEAVORY_ADVERSARIAL=1 or opts.adversarialMode; recall default min_trust bumps 0.3 → 0.6. Explicit input.min_trust still overrides.

tasks.title: Tamper-alarm detector (Phase G.3)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: scanForTamper(state, writer?) runs audit.verify() and sets runtime.json.tamper_alarm via writer.setTamperAlarm when a mutation is detected. Never throws.

tasks.title: Incident export (Phase G.3)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: exportIncident writes ops/data/incidents/incident-<ts>.json atomically with audit entries, verify result, all beliefs, trust, subscriptions. AuditStore has _adversarialMutate for simulation.

tasks.title: wall_incident demo + gate_wall verify (Phase G.3)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Demo: honest chain → attacker mutates entry → scanForTamper fires alarm → runtime.json.tamper_alarm surfaced → exportIncident writes a new file with verify.ok=false. gate_wall.sh asserts all 5.

tasks.title: cloneState + AuditStore.restoreEntries (Phase G.4)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: cloneState deep-copies beliefs/audit/trust/subscriptions/keyring; does not inherit onOp; carries adversarialMode. AuditStore.restoreEntries bulk-loads with Zod validation preserving entry_hashes (including tampered chains).

tasks.title: Replay module + weavory replay CLI (Phase G.4)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: loadIncident + rehydrateState reconstruct state from ops/data/incidents/*.json including tampered chains. runReplay defaults min_trust=-1 (audit view). CLI flags: --from, --query, --as-of, --top-k, --min-trust, --include-conflicts, --merge-strategy, --json.

tasks.title: gauntlet_branch demo + gate_gauntlet verify (Phase G.4)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Demo: T0 state → clone → main + branch diverge → recall on each returns different AAPL values; recall(as_of=T0) on main sees T0 state only. gate_gauntlet.sh asserts all three value lines AND runs the replay CLI on the incident the demo exports.

tasks.title: Reputation aggregate via recall filters (Phase G.5)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: getReputation returns signer summary (topics, avg_trust, attestation_count, beliefs_authored/live/tombstoned). SubscriptionFilters.reputation_of restricts recall to authored beliefs AND attaches the reputation to output.reputation.

tasks.title: Capability ad convention + discovery helper (Phase G.5)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: CAPABILITY_OFFERS_PREDICATE='capability.offers'. findCapabilities(state, name?) enumerates offers, newest-first, flags withdrawn ones.

tasks.title: Lightweight escrow via causally-linked beliefs (Phase G.5)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: walkEscrowThread(state, root_id) BFS over causes[]. escrowStatus aggregates stages. isEscrowSettled=true iff latest settled step has outcome='accepted'.

tasks.title: bazaar_trade demo + gate_bazaar verify (Phase G.5)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Demo: alice offers → bob discovers + checks reputation → bob pays → alice delivers → bob settles (accepted). walkEscrowThread returns exactly [offer,payment,delivered,settled]. gate_bazaar.sh asserts all five.

tasks.title: Four-arena integration demo (Phase G.6)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: One MCP client against one shared EngineState exercises Commons (subscribe + drain + consensus), Wall (adversarial filter + tamper scan), Gauntlet (cloneState branch + incident), Bazaar (four-stage escrow). Final chain must still verify ok.

tasks.title: gate_throne verify (Phase G.6)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: 7-check verifier: demo exit 0; COMMONS drain + consensus; WALL adversarial + tamper ok; GAUNTLET divergence + incident; BAZAAR 4-stage + settled-accepted; final chain verify=ok; final summary commons=3 wall=true gauntlet=true bazaar=true.

tasks.title: Phase-G retrospective (Phase G.6)
tasks.acceptance_criteria: MASTER_PLAN reflects Phase-G complete, TEST_MATRIX totals bumped (Vitest 127/127, 6 arena gates + 7 Phase-1 gates), WORKLOG final Phase-G entry, STATUS current_phase=G.6_complete.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-1+2: README persistence-claim fix + package.json broken refs
tasks.acceptance_criteria: README no longer claims 'LanceDB / DuckDB are embedded'; 6-row env-var table added. package.json files[] and scripts cleaned of broken refs. pnpm collect:all succeeds.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-3.a: PersistentStore interface + JSONL adapter + unit tests
tasks.acceptance_criteria: 17 unit tests cover happy path + corruption edge cases. PersistentStore interface defined with writeBelief/writeAudit/writeTrust/load/close.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-3.b: wire persistence into EngineState + CLI startup
tasks.acceptance_criteria: EngineState gains persist field + attachPersist + restoreFromRecords. CLI reads env flags, rehydrates, verifies chain, exits(3) on break. Subprocess smoke test round-trips a belief via JSONL.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-3.5: DuckDB adapter with graceful binary fallback
tasks.acceptance_criteria: @duckdb/node-api added as optionalDependencies. Dynamic import + factory try/catch = 3-layer fallback. 9 capability-gated unit tests. Subprocess smoke test round-trips a belief via DuckDB.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-4: pre-believe policy hook + tests
tasks.acceptance_criteria: JSON policy file (subject/predicate allow+deny + max_object_bytes) evaluated before sign/store. WEAVORY_POLICY_FILE env flag. Malformed policy exits(4). 22 unit tests. Subprocess smoke tests all four denial paths.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-5: docs/COMPLIANCE.md — SOC2/ISO/GDPR/EU-AI-Act/NIST mapping
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Row-by-row control mapping with source-file pointers. Explicit out-of-scope section. Reproducibility recipe per claim.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-6: docs/INSTALL.md + docs/DEPLOYMENT.md + docs/RUNBOOK.md
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Three install paths. Env var reference table. Operational scenarios: chain-broken restart, policy denial, backend switch, JSONL compaction, key rotation.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-7: Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml + .dockerignore
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Multi-stage build (node:22-slim). Non-root uid 10001. tini PID 1. Healthcheck via runtime.json freshness. Compose mounts named volume at /data. .dockerignore excludes dev artifacts.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-8: docs/HACKATHON_PITCH.md
tasks.acceptance_criteria: 3-minute pitch script (problem / what it is / 3-beat demo / honest scope). Likely-question playbook. 40/40/20 scoring math.

tasks.title: Phase I.P0-9: docs/SHIP_READINESS.md + control file updates
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Honest current-state snapshot. STATUS current_phase=phase_i_ship_readiness_complete. RISKS R-14..R-17 added with mitigations. WORKLOG Phase-I section. TASKS W-0200..W-0209 seeded as completed.
